summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts implementing REQ-86 (base64 stripping and mimeType detection) and partially REQ-85/REQ-84. However, due to truncation, full verification of the prompt text (REQ-84) and complete parser logic (REQ-85) is limited. Evidence for REQ-86 is strong. REQ-84 and REQ-85 partial evidence exists but cannot be fully confirmed due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Rewrite Gemini API prompt to be a minimal, direct instruction under 200 words with specific fields (sinal, tendencia, confianca, padroes, explicacao), no markdown, JSON-only response, last 5 candles analysis, candlestick chart area identification, no complex scoring/broker logic.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated before the prompt text is visible. The file comment mentions 'basic next-candle prediction' which aligns, but the actual prompt string content cannot be verified from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Parser must strip markdown code fences, fall back to extracting first {...} block, log raw response to console, throw AnalysisApiError with Portuguese message 'Resposta invalida da IA - tente novamente' when JSON cannot be extracted.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated before the response parsing logic is shown. The resizeImage and preprocessImage functions are visible but the fetch/parse logic is cut off at the truncation point.
